body_transformation: The shell now exhibits a thick, cracked earth texture with deep rust and ochre patterns, its beige surface replaced by layered, weathered stone scales. The curled tail tip gains a knuckle-like thickening with hardened skin, while the short stubby legs develop corded muscle definition and coarse bristly fur along the limbs. The rounded head maintains its shape but features a pronounced angular jawline and a brow ridge with scar tissue patterns. The light blue body coloration shifts to a burnt sienna hue, with the pale underbelly now a charcoal gray, all while preserving the original proportions and silhouette.
signature_feature: Shell: weathered stone scales with deep rust cracks and ochre fissures.
